scripts.genAll:
npm run realize:all && echo '
✅ Code generation complete!
' && echo '📦 Installing dependencies...
' && cd generated/code && npm install && echo '
🗄️  Setting up database...
' && npm run db:setup && echo '
✅ Setup complete! Next steps:
' && echo '   npm run app:build  # Build the project' && echo '   npm run app:test   # Run tests' && echo '   npm run app:start  # Start production server' && echo '   npm run app:dev:backend   # Start backend dev server' && echo '   npm run app:dev:frontend  # Start frontend dev server
'
scripts.app:build: if [ -d generated/code ]; then cd generated/code && npm run build; else echo '❌ No generated code found. Run: npm run genAll'; exit 1; fi
scripts.app:test: if [ -d generated/code ]; then cd generated/code && npm test; else echo '❌ No generated code found. Run: npm run genAll'; exit 1; fi
scripts.app:start: if [ -d generated/code ]; then cd generated/code && npm start; else echo '❌ No generated code found. Run: npm run genAll'; exit 1; fi
scripts.app:dev: echo '⚠️  Development mode requires 2 separate terminals:' && echo '' && echo '  Terminal 1: cd generated/code && npm run dev:backend' && echo '  Terminal 2: cd generated/code && npm run dev:frontend' && echo '' && echo 'Or use the shortcut commands:' && echo '  npm run app:dev:backend' && echo '  npm run app:dev:frontend'
scripts.app:dev:backend: if [ -d generated/code ]; then cd generated/code && npm run dev:backend; else echo '❌ No generated code found. Run: npm run genAll'; exit 1; fi
scripts.app:dev:frontend: if [ -d generated/code ]; then cd generated/code && npm run dev:frontend; else echo '❌ No generated code found. Run: npm run genAll'; exit 1; fi
scripts.validate:all: npm run validate && npm run validate:manifests
scripts.validate:manifests: specverse validate manifests/docker-compose.specly && specverse validate manifests/kubernetes.specly
scripts.generate:diagram:er: specverse gen diagram specs/main.specly -t er-diagram -o docs/diagrams/er-diagram.mmd
scripts.generate:diagram:event-flow: specverse gen diagram specs/main.specly -t event-flow-layered -o docs/diagrams/event-flow-layered.mmd
scripts.generate:diagram:lifecycle: specverse gen diagram specs/main.specly -t lifecycle -o docs/diagrams/lifecycle.mmd
scripts.generate:diagram:deployment: specverse gen diagram specs/main.specly -t deployment-topology -o docs/diagrams/deployment.mmd
scripts.generate:diagram:architecture: specverse gen diagram specs/main.specly -t model-architecture -o docs/diagrams/architecture.mmd
scripts.generate:complete: npm run infer && npm run infer:docs
scripts.infer:docs: specverse gen docs generated/{{projectNameKebab}}-complete.specly --output generated/docs/complete-docs.md && specverse gen diagram generated/{{projectNameKebab}}-complete.specly --output generated/docs/complete-diagrams
scripts.infer:deployment:docs: specverse gen docs generated/{{projectNameKebab}}-deployed.specly --output generated/docs/deployed-docs.md && specverse gen diagram generated/{{projectNameKebab}}-deployed.specly --output generated/docs/deployed-diagrams
scripts.infer:deployment:prod:docs: specverse gen docs generated/{{projectNameKebab}}-deployed-prod.specly --output generated/docs/deployed-prod-docs.md && specverse gen diagram generated/{{projectNameKebab}}-deployed-prod.specly --output generated/docs/deployed-prod-diagrams
scripts.realize:all: specverse realize all specs/main.specly -m manifests/implementation.yaml -o generated/code
scripts.test:generated:compile: cd generated/code && npx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck 2>&1 || echo 'TypeScript compilation check (some errors expected without npm install)'
scripts.test:generated:run: cd generated/code && npm install && npm run db:generate && echo 'Generated code is ready to run with: npm run dev'
